name: Facial Pick-me-up
directions: Blend all together.
Cleanse your face.
Massage in a small amount of the above oil.
Use your forefingers and work in circular movements from the jawline to the temple.
This encourages better blood flow which has a beneficial effect on your mood.
It also makes your complexion fresher and brighter!

similar.name: Problem-Prone Skin Mask for the Face

name: Surprise Party Facial Mask
directions: Mix both until smooth and creamy.
Spread on your face.
Keep it on for 15 minutes, then wash off with tepid water and pat dry.

similar.name: Banana Supreme Facial Mask for Dry Skin

name: Banish Those Pimples Treatment
directions: Mix the first 3 ingredients together in a small dish and then into your scalp.
While your scalp is getting treated, prepare another paste of yogurt and mint leaves.
Wash face well.
Pat dry.
Apply the mint paste on your face.
Leave it on for an hour.
Rinse off with room temperature water.
Repeat treatment atleast thrice a week for best results.
Also, make sure to drink atleast 8-10 glasses of water everyday.
Eat healthy and nutritious foods.
You will soon be pimple free!

name: Fruit Facial Smoothie
directions: Mix the melon, pineapple and seltzer water together in a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Apply onto your damp face and neck.
Keep it on for 15 minutes.
Rinse with cold water.
Pat dry.
Moisturise with your favourite moisturiser.
Enjoy!

name: Cucumber Avocado Facial Cooling Mask
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a blender and process until a smooth paste like consistency is obtained.
Apply the mask immediately if you are short on time or else you can refrigerate the mask and apply after 30 minutes. This is wonderful in summer months.
To apply, in circular upward motions, apply 2 tbsps. of this mixture on your face and neck.
Allow the mask to remain on your face for 30 minutes or until it dries up.
To remove it, wash your face and neck with warm water followed by cold water.
Pat dry with a clean soft towel.
Enjoy and smile away!

similar.name: Banana Supreme Facial Mask for Dry Skin

name: Banana Supreme Facial Mask for Dry Skin
directions: Combine the ingredients in a small bowl.
Smoothly apply over the face in upward circular motion.
Allow to sit for 10 minutes.
Rinse off with cool water.
Pat dry with a clean towel.
Enjoy!

directions: Mix both ingredients in a bowl.

Rinse with cool water and pat dry.

name: Problem-Prone Skin Mask for the Face
directions: Let the rosemary steep into the apple cider vinegar overnight. Discard the rosemary sprig afterwards.
When you are ready, mix up the vinegar with the yogurt and the yeast and apply a thin layer to skin.
Let set for 15 minutes then rinse with warm water.

name: Watermelon Facial
directions: Mix watermelon juice and avocado thoroughly.
Apply to your face and let it sit for 20 minutes before rinsing with warm water.

name: Avocado & Oat Facial
directions: Blend avocado, honey and oatmeal flakes.
Apply a decent layer to your face and let sit for 10-15 minutes. Rinse well.
To exfoliate away dry, dull skin, after allowing the homemade facial mask recipe to sit for 10-15 minutes, use gentle circular motions to scrub your face using the oatmeal as a manual exfoliator.
